events.description: Q1 2026 Board of Directors Meeting. Date: Sunday, March 15, 2026. Time: 10:00 AM – 4:00 PM (EDT). Location: ACME Corp Headquarters, Executive Boardroom, 25th Floor, 200 Park Avenue, New York, NY 10166. Video conference option: Zoom – Meeting ID 987 654 3210, Passcode: Board2026. Tentative agenda: 10:00 AM Call to Order; 10:15 AM CEO Report; 11:00 AM CFO Financial Review; 12:00 PM Working Lunch; 1:00 PM Strategic Initiatives; 2:30 PM Committee Reports; 3:30 PM New Business; 4:00 PM Adjournment. Board materials will be distributed one week prior to the meeting. Please confirm your attendance by March 1, 2026.
